email_funnel.reason: Both touch funnels.js and emailMarketingService.js; task 003 builds on 002's pipeline wiring

nostr_auth.reason: Both use nostr-tools; NIP-99 can reuse auth patterns from NIP-98 task

creator_migration.reason: Both create/extend importService.js; task 007 should reuse service created in task 006

frontend_design.reason: Large refactor spanning 33+ HTML files; needs sustained warm context and iterative validation

subscriptions.reason: Large feature — schema + Stripe recurring + webhooks + content gating + UI; multiple build-test-fix cycles needed

referral_system.reason: Touches checkout.js webhook handler and adds new schema tables

independent.reason: No file overlap with each other or other groups — can run in any order

context.synthesis_notes: Round 19. 29 items git-deduped (most P2 Creator Toolkit items completed in prior sessions). 12 new tasks focus on remaining Phase 2 features: email funnel automation, AI funnel builder, creator migration tools (Gumroad/CSV import), Nostr ecosystem (NIP-98/NIP-99), cross-store referrals, memberships/subscriptions, and machine-payable endpoints. Long-running tasks (design system, memberships) should run in managed mode. Creator migration tools (006+007) share importService.js and should run sequentially. Human tasks HT-018 and HT-019 added for production filesystem verification and SMTP config.
